en: A PSALM OF THE SONS OF KORAH. A SONG. On the holy mount stands the city he founded;
zh: 耶和華所立的根基在聖山上。

en: the LORD loves the gates of Zion more than all the dwelling places of Jacob.
zh: 耶和華愛錫安的城門， 勝過雅各的一切居所。

en: Glorious things of you are spoken, O city of God. Selah
zh: 神的城啊！ 有很多榮耀的事，都是指著你說的。

en: Among those who know me I mention Rahab and Babylon; behold, Philistia and Tyre, with Cush- "This one was born there," they say.
zh: “在認識我的人中，我提到拉哈伯和巴比倫， 看哪！還有非利士、推羅和古實，我說： ‘這一個是生在那裡的。’”

en: And of Zion it shall be said, "This one and that one were born in her"; for the Most High himself will establish her.
zh: 論到錫安，必有話說： “這一個、那一個都是生在錫安的。” 至高者必親自堅立這城。

en: The LORD records as he registers the peoples, "This one was born there." Selah
zh: 耶和華登記萬民的時候，必記著： “這一個是生在那裡的。”

en: Singers and dancers alike say, "All my springs are in you."
zh: 他們跳舞歌唱的時候，要說： “我的泉源都在你裡面。”
